data: {"response": {"candidates": [{"content": {"role": "model","parts": [{"thought": true,"text": "**Prioritizing Tool Specificity**\n\nI'm focusing now on tool specificity. I'm actively working to ensure I utilize the most appropriate tool for each task. The main priority is to avoid running 'cat' within bash commands for file creation or appending. Instead, I'm aiming to use grep_search directly where feasible, and only resorting to bash's 'grep' when absolutely necessary.\n\n\n"}]}}],"usageMetadata": {"promptTokenCount": 60727,"totalTokenCount": 60727},"modelVersion": "gemini-pro-default","responseId": "ZrMLatO0AcrRjuMPtMLrsAc"},"traceId": "32b21256079328b2","metadata": {}}

data: {"response": {"candidates": [{"content": {"role": "model","parts": [{"thoughtSignature": "","functionCall": {"name": "run_command","args": {"CommandLine": "node -e \"\nconst fs = require('fs');\nconst content = fs.readFileSync('f:/AUDIRA-ROUTET/open-sse/translator/request/openai-to-kiro.js', 'utf8');\nlet depth = 0;\nconst stack = [];\nconst lines = content.split('\\n');\nfor (let i = 0; i \u003c lines.length; i++) {\n  const line = lines[i];\n  // Simple regex to remove string literals so we don't count braces inside strings\n  const cleanLine = line.replace(/['\\\"].*?['\\\"]/g, '');\n  for (let j = 0; j \u003c cleanLine.length; j++) {\n    const char = cleanLine[j];\n    if (char === '{') {\n      depth++;\n      stack.push(i + 1);\n    }\n    if (char === '}') {\n      depth--;\n      stack.pop();\n    }\n  }\n}\nconsole.log('Unclosed blocks start at lines:', stack);\n\"","Cwd": "f:\\AUDIRA-ROUTET","SafeToAutoRun": true,"WaitMsBeforeAsync": 5000},"id": "b5dvddtc"}}]}}],"usageMetadata": {"promptTokenCount": 60727,"candidatesTokenCount": 286,"totalTokenCount": 61306,"thoughtsTokenCount": 293},"modelVersion": "gemini-pro-default","responseId": "ZrMLatO0AcrRjuMPtMLrsAc"},"traceId": "32b21256079328b2","metadata": {}}
